SiteKit Theme Preview

Compare full-layout themes – each layout template shown with a representative color scheme, font pairing, and light/dark mode. Each variant gets a Home tile and an Article tile so the chrome AND the long-form reading experience are side-by-side.

Each tile is a complete, self-contained page scaled down to fit. Open a tile in its own tab for a full-size view. Tailshare this file to review the grid from your phone.
